name: AIDLC Spec to Issues
description: After AIDLC user stories file is created, creates GitHub issues and adds them to the project board.

then.prompt: The AIDLC user stories file was just created. Read .kiro/steering/project-config.md and check if a power is registered with category 'project-management'. If yes, activate that power using kiroPowers. Then read aidlc-docs/inception/user-stories/stories.md and for each user story: 1) Create a GitHub issue in the configured repo (from project-config.md) with title '[AIDLC Story {id}] {title}', body containing the story text + acceptance criteria as checkboxes, labels 'aidlc:story'. 2) Add each issue to the configured project board. 3) Report how many issues were created. If no project-management power is registered or project-config has placeholder values, skip silently.
